_comment: Single source of truth for hook blocklists. Consumed by bash hooks (settings.json) and PowerShell hooks (templates/hooks-windows/*.ps1). Patterns intentionally use character-class splits (e.g. s[k]-, A[K]IA, O[P]ENAI) so this file itself doesn't trip the secret-scanner. Regex semantics are unchanged — [x] matches x.

destructive.description: Irreversible shell commands to block. Case-insensitive.

secrets.description: Real API keys / credentials. Block write/edit unless target file is in allow-list. Each regex is written with [x] splits to prevent the hook that scans this file from matching itself.
